ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the communication room */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the room (e.g., chat room, video call) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the room's purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the room was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the room was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_members" (
  "room_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the room */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room the user is a member of */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined the room */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user left the room (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is currently a member of the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_members_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., user joined, user left) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the event */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content associated with the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where the event took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_events_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_events_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_call_events" (
  "video_call_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video call event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding communication event */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video call in seconds */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the video call */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the video call event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_call_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_call_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES communication_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., participation rate, meeting frequency) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
